title: RegistryEntry
description: Schema for a single skill entry in skills/registry.json. The origin_metadata field is required for all skills registered at v5.1.0 or later; pre-v5.1.0 entries that lack it are exempted with a WARN in validate-skills.sh.

domain.description: Domain category (e.g. requirements, review, system, meta).

path.description: Relative path to the SKILL.md file.

origin_metadata.description: Provenance and approval metadata. Required for all skills registered after v5.1.0 (FEATURE-003). Pre-v5.1.0 skills without this field receive a WARN in validate-skills.sh (not an error).

source.description: How the skill was created: 'human' for directly authored, 'gap-triggered' for gap-to-skill pipeline output, 'migrated' for pre-v5.1.0 back-fills, 'unknown' if not determinable.

created_by_session.description: UUID v4 of the session in which the skill was registered. Null if not captured.

approval_tier.description: Governance tier: 'standard' for human-authored (full quality-scoring + HITL), 'expedited' for gap-triggered (auto quality-scoring + non-bypassable HITL), 'legacy' for pre-v5.1.0 (no retroactive review).

dedup_override.description: True if the FEATURE-002 dedup check returned DEDUP_HIT and the author chose to proceed anyway.

dedup_override_reason.description: Author's justification for proceeding despite a DEDUP_HIT. Null when dedup_override = false.

created_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of skill registration.
